data.title: SEI Investments (NASDAQ:SEIC) surpasses Q2 expectations: EPS $1.20 (est. $1.16), sales $559.6M (est. $555.7M). Analysts reduce forecasts post-results.
data.description: SEI Investments Company (NASDAQ: SEIC) exceeded expectations in Q2, announcing earnings of $1.20 per share, surpassing the estimated $1.16 per share. The company also reported quarterly sales of $559.601 million, beating the expected $555.724 million. CEO Ryan Hicke expressed satisfaction with the strong performance, emphasizing strategic investments in talent, technology, and infrastructure to facilitate growth and better serve clients. The company remains focused on enhancing capabilities and scalability.

data.title: Global iron desulfurization catalyst market report predicts growth in Asia-Pacific, focusing on 2025-2034 trends.
data.description: A recent report titled "Global Complex Iron Desulfurization Catalyst Market Analysis 2025-2034" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The complex iron desulfurization catalyst market plays a critical role in the petroleum refining and natural gas processing sectors by aiding in the elimination of sulfur compounds to generate cleaner fuels. The market is witnessing growth due to this essential function.

data.title: GameSquare acquired CryptoPunk #5577 for $5.15 million in preferred stock, making Leshner a shareholder. The move strengthens their commitment to Ethereum strategies.
data.description: GameSquare (NASDAQ: GAME) has finalized the acquisition of CryptoPunk #5577, an extremely rare and culturally significant NFT, from Robert Leshner, Compound founder and Superstate CEO. The transaction involved issuing $5.15 million worth of preferred stock in exchange. This deal was completed by offering GameSquare preferred shares that can be converted to common stock at $1.50 per share, thereby making Leshner an official shareholder in the company. This move showcases GameSquare's enhanced focus on Ethereum-native strategies, positioning them as a key player in traditional markets embracing digital assets. The specific NFT acquired, known as the "Cowboy Ape," belongs to the original 10,000-piece CryptoPunk collection by Larva Labs. It stands out as one of only 24 "Ape" Punks and is distinguished by its cowboy hat feature among other traits.

data.title: SUI price jumps by 4.65% to $3.85 with technical indicators showing bullish signs for Layer-1 token.
data.description: The Layer-1 blockchain token Sui (SUI) is currently trading at $3.85, showing robust momentum. Its Relative Strength Index (RSI) has entered the neutral zone, while moving averages indicate a sustained upward trend.

data.title: Valero Energy surpasses Q2 earnings estimates, with revenue at $29.89 billion and adjusted earnings at $2.28 per share.
data.description: Valero Energy Corp (NYSE: VLO) released its second-quarter financial results, revealing revenue of $29.89 billion, surpassing analyst predictions of $27.36 billion. The company also reported adjusted earnings of $2.28 per share for the quarter, which exceeded estimates of $1.94 per share. These strong results were shared before the market opened on Thursday. For more details, you can find the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: New podcast hosted by Nav Thethi explores AI in business leadership. Launches on July 24, 2025.
data.description: In the bustling city of San Francisco, a fresh podcast has emerged on July 24, 2025. The Nav Thethi Show, spearheaded by Nav Thethi, an authority in digital strategy, delves into the intersection of AI, strategy, and human-centered leadership in driving business revolution. This podcast promises a captivating exploration of how these forces are reshaping the corporate landscape. Tune in to gain insights into cutting-edge approaches in business transformation that are shaping the future. Stay informed and inspired by industry experts sharing their knowledge and experiences. Experience this enlightening podcast that is set to impact the business world.

data.title: Redwood Credit Union grants $10,000 to Good Farm Fund in Santa Rosa, expanding access to fresh, local food in Lake and Mendocino counties. #RCU #foodaccess
data.description: In Santa Rosa, California, Redwood Credit Union (RCU) is contributing to enhancing food availability by granting $10,000 to the Good Farm Fund. This move showcases RCU's dedication to bolstering local economies and improving food accessibility within its service communities. The grant is aimed at supporting small farms in Lake and Mendocino counties, a cause that RCU has been actively championing. By providing financial assistance to local farmers, RCU is playing a significant role in promoting sustainable practices and ensuring the long-term viability of these small-scale agricultural ventures.

data.title: Whale moves $469M worth of BTC after 14 years to a new address.
data.description: A Bitcoin investor with nearly $500 million in BTC transferred the substantial fortune to a different address last Thursday. The cryptocurrency had been held for over 14 years before the transfer.

data.title: Inventor from Fowlerville, Mich., develops THE BLOCK SADDLE for rebar in concrete. Patent number KSG-135.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on July 24, 2025, an inventor from Fowlerville, Michigan, shared a breakthrough in construction innovation. The inventor introduced THE BLOCK SADDLE, a solution aimed at securely holding a section of rebar in place within concrete that is poured into a block or form. The inventor expressed the idea to enhance efficiency and precision in construction processes. This invention is designed to keep the rebar properly centered during the pouring process, providing a more reliable and sturdy framework.

data.title: Nvidia and AI chipmakers expected to benefit from Google's capex boost and Trump's AI Action Plan, analysts predict.
data.description: According to analysts, the recent AI Action Plan introduced by the Trump administration along with Google's significant rise in data center spending are expected to positively impact Nvidia and other AI chip stocks. This move is set to provide a boost to these companies as they align their strategies with the increasing demand for artificial intelligence technologies. The surge in Google's capital expenditure in data centers, combined with the government's support for AI initiatives, is seen as a driving force behind this upward trend in the market. Investors and industry experts anticipate this shift to generate substantial growth opportunities for Nvidia and other players in the AI semiconductor sector.

data.title: AI stock fell after software maker C3.ai CEO Thomas Siebel announced resignation for health reasons.
data.description: On Thursday, AI stock experienced a decline following the announcement from software company C3.ai that their CEO, Thomas Siebel, will be stepping down due to health reasons. This news caused a drop in the stock value. This change in leadership was revealed in a report by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: 10x Genomics stock gets RS rating upgrade, showing improved technical performance. Will it continue rising?
data.description: 10x Genomics has received a Relative Strength Rating upgrade, indicating an improvement in its technical performance. Investors are now wondering if this positive trend will persist. This notable upgrade comes at a crucial time for the company, with a growing focus on its stock performance. With the upgrade in place, 10x Genomics is poised to attract more attention from investors looking for potential growth opportunities in the market. The post highlighting the stock's status can be found on Investor's Business Daily, offering further insights into this notable development.

data.title: OP price holds steady at $0.71, up 1.43%, amid uncertainty over 31M token unlock on July 31st. Whale accumulation drives mixed signals.
data.description: The stock of OP is currently trading at $0.71, showing a daily increase of 1.43%. The market is experiencing mixed signals due to a scenario where whale accumulation is conflicting with an anticipated release of 31 million tokens on July 31st. This situation has raised concerns among investors.

data.title: Corpay to divest a fuel card portfolio, expected to gain $60M and free up $35M in working capital for new acquisitions.
data.description: Atlanta-based company Corpay, Inc. (NYSE: CPAY) has revealed its decision to sell off a lower growth private label fuel card portfolio from its legacy assets. The divestiture is projected to generate around $60 million in revenue for Corpay and release about $35 million in working capital. The company intends to channel these funds towards its acquisition of Alpha Group International plc. This move aligns with Corpay's strategy to adjust its portfolio towards.
